overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a dark dirt trail at night, illuminated only by a flashlight. The environment consists of grassy terrain and bushes lining the path, with distant trees visible against the night sky. The atmosphere is tense and exploratory, typical of survival or horror game genres.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the dark dirt path, sweeping the flashlight across the ground ahead to navigate the terrain

entered.detail: unpaved path with scattered stones and gravel illuminated by the flashlight beam
tall wild grass lining the left edge of the trail
dense bushes and vegetation on the right embankment
dark silhouettes of trees forming the forest edge against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. The path is illuminated by a flashlight that reveals gravel and stones underfoot, while tall grass and bushes line both sides of the trail. The surrounding area is pitch black beyond the reach of the light, with only the dark silhouettes of distant trees visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person progression along a desolate dirt trail through a pitch-black forest at night. It begins with the camera moving forward, where a narrow beam of flashlight illuminates the gravel and stones directly underfoot. As the movement continues, the light reveals dense tall grass and thick bushes crowding the edges of the path. The scene then expands slightly to show the oppressive darkness of the surrounding woods, where only the stark silhouettes of distant trees are visible against the night sky.
